text:
The domain for variable
$x$
is the set of negative real numbers. Select the statement that correctly describes the proposition
$\exists x  \, (x^2 \le x)$
.
b: The proposition is true, and\n$x = -\frac{1}{2}$\nis an example.
c: The proposition is true, and\n$x = 2$\nis an example.
d: The proposition is true, and\n$x = -2$\nan example.
